title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
